title: 2-Piece Traditional Secateurs Set – Includes Anvil & Bypass Pruners with Drop-Forged Carbon Steel Blades – Safety Locking Catches & Non-Slip Cushion Grips – Ideal for Woody & Green Stems
features: Traditional Secateurs Set – Includes both anvil and bypass secateurs, offering the perfect tools for tackling a variety of gardening tasks on both woody and green stems
Durable Carbon Steel Blades – Made with drop-forged carbon steel for enhanced strength, durability, and long-lasting cutting performance
Specialized Cutting Action – Anvil pruner reduces stem twisting on hard, woody stems, while the bypass pruner minimizes bruising on soft, green stems for healthier plant growth
Comfortable Non-Slip Grips – Cushioned, ergonomic handles provide a secure, comfortable grip to reduce hand fatigue during prolonged use
Built-In Safety Locks – Both secateurs come equipped with easy-to-use locking catches for safe handling and convenient storage
description: Take on a wide variety of pruning tasks with this versatile 2-Piece Secateurs Set, featuring both anvil and bypass pruners designed to handle everything from woody branches to delicate green stems. Whether you're a professional landscaper or a home gardening enthusiast, this set offers the perfect cutting tools for precise, clean results. Each secateur is manufactured with drop-forged carbon steel blades, providing exceptional strength, durability, and long-lasting sharpness. The anvil pruner is ideal for tougher, woody stems, using a single cutting blade that closes against a flat surface to reduce stem twisting and maximize cutting power. The bypass pruner, on the other hand, features a scissor-like action that’s perfect for live, green stems, minimizing bruising and promoting healthy plant growth. Both tools are equipped with safety locking catches for secure storage and peace of mind. The non-slip cushion grips offer added comfort and control during extended use, helping reduce hand fatigue and improving precision.
